author: anon-59ff128d
content: Decision: Using backup-before-rename approach. Before the commit phase, read each destination file's current content. If any persist() fails mid-commit, restore already-persisted files from saved originals. This gives true all-or-nothing semantics. Alternative was documenting as best-effort, but since --atomic is user-facing and the design doc promises transactional writes, we need the real guarantee.
